pa5_condition: initial PA5 low / far-left HOME switch closed / PA mask 20h clear
action: Calls 5253h for a short rightward off-home probe, then branches on PA mask 20h.
vv61_or_control: A=03h through CALT 00BA sets F003 bit1; VV61=80h keeps VV61.0 clear
evidence: OFFI PA,20h at 51F7 skips the 520Bh branch when PA mask 20h is clear; 5204h calls 5253h. 5207h sends PA mask 20h set to 520Bh and PA mask 20h clear to 521Dh.
notes: Schematic review shows PA5 has a 15K pullup to +5 V and the far-left HOME switch closes to ground, so clear means active-low HOME assertion. If the probe opens HOME, firmware seeks left back to HOME before the move-away check.

pa5_condition: initial PA5 high / far-left HOME switch open, or PA5 high after the short probe
action: Calls 5253h for a long leftward seek to HOME. The following PA mask 20h test must be clear or the routine enters the 53E1h error/reinitialization path.
vv61_or_control: A=FCh through CALT 00B8 clears F003 bits 0/1; VV61=41h sets VV61.0
evidence: 520Bh is reached from initial PA mask 20h set or from 5207h when PA mask 20h is set after the short probe. 5217h OFFI PA,20h skips the error jump only when PA mask 20h is clear.
notes: This seek must assert far-left HOME before the 10-step move-away confirmation.

pa5_condition: PA5 low / far-left HOME switch closed after the long seek, or PA5 low after the short probe
action: Calls 5253h for a 10-step rightward move-away check. The following PA mask 20h test must be set or the routine enters the 53E1h error/reinitialization path.
vv61_or_control: A=FEh through CALT 00B8 clears F003 bit0; A=02h through CALT 00BA sets F003 bit1; VV61=00h keeps VV61.0 clear
evidence: 521Dh sets the control masks and VV61=00h before 5229h calls 5253h. 522Ch ONI PA,20h skips the error jump only when PA mask 20h is set.
notes: If HOME remains asserted after this rightward move, firmware treats it as an error condition.

pa5_condition: PA5 high / far-left HOME switch open after the 10-step confirmation
action: Calls 5253h for a final long leftward return to HOME. The following PA mask 20h test must be clear; success seeds EF0F and EF11.
vv61_or_control: A=01h through CALT 00BA sets F003 bit0, A=FDh through CALT 00B8 clears F003 bit1; VV61=C1h sets VV61.0
evidence: 523Eh calls 5253h. 5241h OFFI PA,20h skips the error jump only when PA mask 20h is clear. 5247h-524Eh stores 0003h to EF0F and EF11.
notes: Successful startup home seek leaves both the home/reference position and current position variables at 0003h.

pa5_condition: Called by all four motion stages
action: Selects 547Eh drive-current state, walks the startup carriage delay table, pulses PC7/TM through 0908h, restores 546Ah hold current, then waits.
vv61_or_control: Uses VV61 bits to choose direction/table loops
evidence: 5253h calls 547Eh; 52FBh indexes timing words and calls 5306h before jumping to 0908h; 528Ch restores 546Ah hold current; 5287h/5294h load the 72AFh and 72B1h delay words.
notes: 7287h/729Bh/72ADh are 10 us-scaled startup timed-seek delay words with manual timing overlap. Runtime carriage acceleration/deceleration profiles are mapped separately in the 7005h record family. 72AFh/72B1h are 10 ms and 50 ms if interpreted as the same 10 us units.

action: Splits the delay into three waits and samples PA5 through PA mask 20h after each third.
evidence: ONI PA,20h at 530Ch/5314h/531Ch skips the ADI D,1 when PA mask 20h is set; therefore D increments only for PA mask 20h clear samples. Since PA5 has a 15K pullup to +5 V and the far-left HOME switch closes to ground, these are active-low HOME samples.
notes: Caller tests D in the 5253h timing walk, so the startup seek uses a majority/consistency check instead of a single sample.

pa5_condition: success path and optional startup follow-up
action: Seeds EF0F/EF11 to 0003h after successful home seek; startup can call 5771h and then copy EF0F back to EF11.
evidence: 5247h stores 0003h to EF0F and EF11. After returning from 51F7h, startup calls 5771h when VV03.0 is set, clears VV0E.4, then copies EF0F to EF11 at 0359h-035Dh.
notes: 53B9h compares requested target HL against EF0F and only schedules motion when the difference is at most 001Ah; treat this as a local-motion scheduler guard. The manual's 22 phase-switch HOME-to-print-area distance is a horizontal coordinate-geometry anchor, not an unresolved home-seek stage.
